description: Ingest the legacy fixed-width patient census data from /home/ga/Documents/legacy_census.dat using a channel named 'Legacy_Census_Ingest'. The channel should process files from /var/spool/mirth/inbox (inside the container) by splitting the input by line. Parse the fixed-width records using the following schema: MRN (chars 0-10), Last Name (chars 10-30), First Name (chars 30-50), DOB (chars 50-58), and Gender (chars 58-59), with all whitespace trimmed. For each patient record, output a JSON file to /var/spool/mirth/outbox named ${mrn}.json containing the keys mrn, firstName, lastName, dob, and gender.
